description: Create snap/snapcraft.yaml with full build definition
notes: Created snap/snapcraft.yaml with 5 parts: nodejs (v22.23.1), bun (v1.3.14), pi-build (clones pi v0.80.6, npm ci, installs clipboard binding, runs build:binary), wl-clipboard (v2.3.0 from source), pi-configuration (wrapper + completion). Uses core26 base with classic confinement. Multi-arch amd64/arm64. Assets and clipboard binding placed in $SNAP/bin/ to match pi's getPackageDir() resolution.

description: Create wrapper script and bash completion (snap/local/)
notes: Created snap/local/pi.wrapper (unsets SNAP_* env vars before exec, same pattern as opencode) and snap/local/pi.completion (bash completion with common flags, tool names, modes, file paths, and @file support).
Created AGENTS.md with project overview, build process, key files, architecture notes, version management, clipboard strategy, and license.

Created .github/actions/install-cached-snap/action.yaml (composite action with caching for snapd, core24, LXD, snapcraft, image-garden snaps) and action.sh (download + install logic with cache hit/miss detection). Adapted from opencode-snap.

description: Create renovate.json with custom regex managers
notes: Created renovate.json with 3 custom regex managers: pi version in snapcraft.yaml (source-tag), pi version in smoke test (task.yaml), and Bun version (download URL). Adapted from opencode-snap pattern.

description: Create CI/CD workflows (pack, build, upload, promote, releas
notes: Created 5 CI/CD workflow files: snapcraft-pack.yml (reusable build for one arch), build.yml (CI entry point: pack amd64+arm64 → smoke test → upload), snapcraft-upload.yml (store upload with environment gates), snapcraft-promote.yml (manual channel promotion), release.yml (tag validation + GitHub release creation). Adapted from opencode-snap, simplified for no desktop component.

description: Create spread testing infrastructure (spread.yaml, smoke tes
notes: Created spread.yaml (backends: ubuntu-cloud-26.04, ubuntu-cloud-24.04, debian-cloud-13; uses image-garden) and tests/smoke/pi/task.yaml (basic smoke test: snap installed, --help works, --version returns a version number).
Created publishing/README.md with CI/CD publishing docs, store credential setup, manual build/publish steps, channel promotion guide, and release workflow description.

Updated README.md with comprehensive documentation covering: what pi is, build strategy (Bun binary reusing build:binary), all 5 snap parts, clipboard strategy (native + wl-clipboard), runtime assets, version management via Renovate, project structure, building instructions, spread testing, publishing docs reference, and contributing guidelines.
